title: theligonum formosanum
intro: Theligonum formosanum, also known as the Formosan theligon, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Theligonum formosanum are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Theligonum formosanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine in various forms, such as dried root or leaf extracts.
